segment-text: EXT. BUCHANAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS - DAY A place of beauty. Hallowed halls of brick and stone. Birds
chirp. Bells toll, stately and serene. Statues of long-dead rich white men look out over perfectly manicured lawns. PULL BACK THROUGH ornate gothic windows, into the...
INT. LECTURE HALL - DAY
...Where students sit at attention, laptops open. Eager undergrads who would consider themselves woke.
front of the room...

But looking closer, we see Kunle's doodling in the margin of his notes. He's sketching a cute GIRL, who's biting her pen, deep in thought. He's actually pretty good. At the front of the room, PROFESSOR CLARKE (50s, White,
Kunle looks over at a cute girl, biting her pen. We'll come

As the professor goes on, Kunle feels a tap on his shoulder. He turns, reluctantly, to see... SEAN (21, Black), his best friend, leaning in conspiratorially. He's a big, athletic-looking guy, incapable of being totally inconspicuous.
(whispering) Yo. I got us into Blackout.
For real?
Sean does a quick, quiet dance of celebration, before slouching back down in his seat, eyes glued to the phone screen hidden in his lap. He resumes texting. Kunle turns back to the lecture, where...
...we're talking about hate speech. You are free to step outside if you need to...

Suddenly, Kunle looks down. Sean is sneakily handing him a Gatorade bottle. Kunle shakes his head. Not now. Sean clocks Kunle's drawing. Takes a big swig of "Gatorade." Kunle, embarrassed, turns the page, hiding his sketch. A beat. Kunle's phone buzzes in his pocket. He takes it out. It's a series of texts from Sean: you so thirsty you drawing your own hentai [cry-laugh emoji] Kunle looks over to see Sean is, in fact, stifling a laugh. He replies: [brown middle finger
Kunle rolls his eyes, turns his attention back to class:
Before we go any further, I just want to re-state the trigger warning. Good? Good. So. Let's talk about... the infamous N word.
The word NIGGER is projected, large, on the screen overhead.
The word "nigger" has a long and terrible history.
Sean and Kunle exchange glances. Did she just say it?

It occupies a unique space in modern American vernacular, as it is so taboo that some of you are likely feeling uncomfortable right now, even when the term is used in an isolated, academic context. My question for you is: what makes this word so powerful?
The class is quiet. Then a WHITE STUDENT raises her hand.
I mean, because it's racist?
There are other racist, offensive words. Why is nigger different?
It catches the room off-guard, again.
The word originates in the Spanish negro, and at first it was a neutral term...
As she continues, Sean leans toward Kunle.
(sotto) Yo...Is this allowed?
I mean... It's on the syllabus... There was a trigger warning.
--whereas the word "nigga" with an "a" at the end occupies a different space, somehow lesser than its hard r counterpart--
She keeps saying it.
Kunle notices students glancing over at him, uncomfortable.
She's British. Maybe she doesn't know...
If she don't know, why's she teaching a class on it?
A beat, as they both realize... the professor has gone quiet. And she is looking right at them.
I don't mean to put you two on the spot, but it sounds like you have something to say. Please...
Sean doesn't seem to want to say anything.
(sincere) This is a safe place. What do you think keeps this word so powerful?
We pull out to see the rest of the students, waiting eagerly for Sean and Kunle to weigh in.
I... I think part of it is because,

as a society-The lecture hall doors burst open, revealing a horde of DRUNK GUYS (19ish, White) wearing suits of armor made of Budweiser boxes, holding long "swords" made of duct-taped beer cans. DRUNK GUY
Kunle watches, stunned, as the drunk guys charge all the way across the room... and out the opposite doors. A beat. Everyone is staring at him once more.
Sorry about that. You were saying?
Music BLARES like a POLICE SIREN. One word fills the screen:
EXT. LECTURE HALL - CAMPUS - DUSK
Students flood out of the lecture hall, Sean and Kunle among them. Sean shakes his head at Kunle. They walk and talk:
What? I was participating in the discussion. You could've spoken up, if it bothered you so much. You just sat there-SEAN In silent protest.
Kunle!
The girl from Kunle's drawing falls in step with them. She's got boss nerd energy.
Hey guys. That was...
Weird? Yeah...
That was fucked up.
She shouldn't have put you guys on the spot like that. I'm on Student Senate, if you want to like... start a movement or something. Totally up to you. No pressure.
Thanks. We'll, uh, think about it.
An awkward beat. Kunle clearly wants to talk to her about something--anything--but can't find the words.
You going out tonight, B?
For once, I am. Got a pass to Underground. You?
Nice. We're, uh, going to some parties too...
So... all the parties. You're doing a Legendary Tour? (beat) Wooow. It took me three weeks of ass-kissing just to get into one.
Good thing you didn't get pink eye. From all the ass-kissing.
Sean cringes, but she seems to find it charming.
Oh I did. But seven parties. You guys must have like super crusty pink eye. Virulent conjunctivitis.
We're not going for the parties, really. It's been kind of like our inside joke, since freshman yearSEAN We gonna be the first niggas at this school to do a Legendary Tour.
Is that... something people keep track of?
Yeah.
Yeah.
The Black Student Union has something called...
INT. BLACK STUDENT UNION - HALL OF FIRSTS - DAY
We see the whole HALL OF FIRSTS wall, an expansive array of PHOTO PLAQUES.
The Hall of Firsts. You get a fancy plaque if you're the first black person to do something at Buchanan.
Like, First Black Newspaper Editor. CLOSE ON: A plaque featuring a guy with a huge 1970s fro.
First Black Student Government President.
A plaque featuring a photo of a regal looking black woman in very 1980s fashion.
But they also include other firsts like First Black Man to set foot in
A plaque from 2008, of a black dude stepping into the frat.
And First Black Woman to Get into the Hall of Firsts.
Meta. This is a plaque featuring the same woman from the Black Student Government President plaque.
EXT. CAMPUS - DUSK
Back to Sean, Kunle, and Bianca, walking and talking.
So yeah, we're gonna make Buchanan history tonight. We're on our way to pick up our Blackout passes right now.
Well I salute you in your endeavor. (she salutes) See you guys out there?
We'll text you when we get to Underground. You got her number?
Kunle can tell what he's doing. Helping. It's obvious.
I do.
Text me!
She waves, walks off. Kunle watches her go.
She wants your dick bruh.
They walk and talk, back toward the doors...
She's just being nice.
Nice to your dick.
EXT. CAMPUS COURTYARD - DUSK
They continue out into the courtyard.
What's the problem? She likes you. I'm telling you: she craving that
BBC. Or small-BC, I ain't seen it.
I don't know... We're graduating in two months. I don't want to start something, just to break up.
Or like, you could just smash. (beat) We're gonna be living like a half hour away from here next year. The city's not that far. Beat. Kunle changes the subject:
So should we like... say something? About Professor Clarke? That was fucked up, right? Isn't it like our moral imperative to do something?
We're still talking about this?
She didn't have to say it to make her point...
Okay, guess so.
But on the other hand, it's a class about blasphemy and taboos. It's literally called Blasphemy and Taboos. So if we got her fired, would that be, like, censorship? I'm against censorship.
I mean, we could start a moral crusade. Or we could just... not.
I guess she wasn't throwing the word around, like, willy-nilly.
No, that was some willy-nilly-ass shit. She didn't have to say it. She wanted us to react.
Kunle gives him a thoughtful look. Sean can see what's coming: Kunle's entered into intellectual discussion mode. Once he's started, he cannot be stopped.
But that was kind of the point, right? To analyze why we have that reaction. Why is it so bad? Like, if a white man says the n-word alone in the woods with no one around to hear it, is it bad?
This white dude walks into the middle of the forest just to say the n-word?
He's never said it before, never says it again. He doesn't hate us. He just wants to whisper it quietly to himself. Like... (whispering) Nigger.
That's fucked up.
Why though?
You're such a fuckin' Oreo, man.
That stings a bit, but Kunle pushes forth.
From a deontological perspective, maybe a word can be inherently bad. But from a consequentialist

It's not that complicated: Most of the rules are made by wypipo. We made like one rule that we ask white people to respect. One. Thou shalt not use that one word. But they don't like us telling them what to do, so they be looking for loopholes. So when your white man whispers nigger in a forest, he breaketh the covenant. It ain't like pure evil, it's disrespect. Kunle takes this in, thoughtful.
Anyone ever called you nigger, Kunle?
You.
Not like that.
I mean... online--
No. To your face. For real. ...No.
Sean shrugs. Then they don't need to keep talking. BUZZ. He gets a text.
I think this was a productive discussion.
We all really learned something... (re: the text) FUCK. Victor gave away our Underground passes. Fuck Victor. Man, where we gonna find Underground passes this late?
I don't know but I believe in you.
- A KEY going into a LOCK. - KUNLE and SEAN put on lab coats, safety googles, gloves. - Kunle pulls a tray of PETRI DISHES from a SPECIAL FRIDGE.
INT. BIO LAB - NIGHT
Kunle peers down his microscope at a MOLD SAMPLE.
I think I got a lead.
Sean texts furiously, taking swigs from a GATORADE BOTTLE filled with a BRIGHT PINK LIQUID. He offers some to Kunle, who declines.
I just can't go too hard tonight. I've gotta be here to check my mold samples in the morning.
You sound like a young mother, and those are like your gross little fungus babies.
They are my little fungus babies. (to his fungus) Aren't you? Who's gonna get daddy published? You are. Sean is thoroughly grossed out.
You think maybe you should come into the lab this week? Your data won't analyze itself. Just saying.
It's Spring Break. It's a break. I have like three weeks til it's due.
You're here. You could get some work done. Three weeks is nothing.
Three weeks is three weeks. And I am working. On passes for Underground.
If we can't get into all seven parties, it's not the end of the world. It will be the end of the world if you don't graduate, man.
Kunle. We're making history here. Get your priorities straight.
Kunle gives up, for now. He tried.
Well, can you at least ask for an extra pass for Carlos? It seems like he should come to one party tonight. He's always wanted to go to Underground.
Sean hands Kunle his Gatorade bottle. Kunle takes a small sip. He almost spits it out, horrified.
Jesus, what is this?
Death punch. We need to get a buzz going, we're on a schedule. I'll be right back. Hurry the fuck up.
Sean sheds his lab coat, rushes out of the lab. Kunle sighs. Takes another tiny sip of death punch. Ugh, nope. He screws the cap back on the Gatorade bottle...
INT. DORM HALLWAY - NIGHT

CLOSE ON a tiny bundle of PARTY PASSES, small colorful cards, each the size of a business card. Sean's fratty friend LEO (19, Puerto Rican) flicks through the bundle, finds two for UNDERGROUND. Holds it out... Sean takes it.
Thanks man, I owe you one.
Yeah you fuckin' do. You're lucky, I almost gave my last Undergrounds to a cute freshman. Then I found out she's trying to do long distance with her boyfriend, so now I gotta wait that shit out.

Sean looks up at someone, walking his way... ASA (21, Black), his recent ex, a smart, no-bullshit young woman, currently in her bathrobe, shower caddy in hand. He bids farewell to Leo, and gives Asa a charming smile. But she knows him too well to be impressed. She walks right past him, toward her dorm room. He trails along behind her.
Asa. Where you gonna be tonight?
Asa isn't sure she wants to tell him. A beat. She can't help it, a part of her still likes him.
Me too. Me and Kunle, we're finally doing our Legendary Tour. For real? Sounds intense. And possibly ill-advised.
"Intense and possibly ill-advised" is the tagline for the night.
She unlocks her door, but lingers in her doorway.
As your friend, I just wanna say for the record that maybe you should take it easy.
I'd love to take it easy, but we're
I'm serious. You want to end up on probation again? (MORE) (beat) You're gonna do what you're gonna do. Just don't die.
I'm not gonna die. Don't be dragging Kunle into some bullshit. That boy is Black Excellence. There's still hope for him. Bye Sean.
She snaps the door shut, leaving him alone in the hall.
INT. BIO LAB - NIGHT
Kunle's talking on the phone with his MAMA (50s, Black). She has a Nigerian accent.
Your Anti sent you a package. Did you get it?

Oh, I haven't been home yet-MAMA (O.S.) Remember to call her and say thank you. I told her you got into Princeton and you'll be doing your PhD there, and now she is telling everyone you're going to be a doctor.
Well technically, I will be a doctor, just not of medicine.
It's not too late to go to med school. You would be a wonderful cardiologist.
Mama...
I know. I'm so proud of my baby... But you know what professors get paid, Kunle?
Sean bursts in. Fourteen colorful passes fanned out in his hand. He fans himself with them, victorious.
You better be ready to fucking party. Look at this shit.
Party? What party?
No--It's not really a party. Sean and I are just hanging out with some friends tonight.
Kunle mouths "my mom." Sean gives him an apologetic look.
Why are you going to a party? You should be working on your thesis.
I am-MAMA (V.O.) If you don't do well on your thesis, Princeton will unadmit you. It's not too late for them to change their mind, you know. I've seen in happen. You will lose your
Mama. I know. I'm working on it. Literally right now I am standing in the lab, working on it.
I don't like that Sean boy. He is a bad influence. Undisciplined. On his Instagram, he is always vaping. Tell him that vaping is bad for his health.
I will.
He looks up at Sean, who he notices is drawing something rather elaborate on the whiteboard.
You don't vape, do you?
Of course not. It's bad for you--
What does he want to do with his life, besides party and show his abdominal muscles to the Internet?
He's figuring it out-MAMA No ambition... Why don't you hang out with that Asian boy from your debate club?
Brian Phan? I do--
Or your friend Carlos, the one who interned at SpaceX? He seems like a sweet boy. Oh, I have a patient, I have to go. Remember to call Anti-
I will. Bye Mom.
Kunle hangs up. Takes a breath.
My mother would like me to tell you that vaping is bad for you. Please block her on Instagram.
Hell no. Your mom's scary. She'll call me and make me un-block her. Alright, I need you to pay attention, this is important.
Pull back to see... Sean's drawn a MAP of the campus parties, complete with all the night's party names, locations, times.
Our Legendary Tour. We start at
Blackout, and work our way east.
INT. BLACKOUT PARTY - NIGHT
Kunle and Sean step past the Bouncers, through the fog, and into...Blackout. Everyone's in all white, looking awesome under the blacklights. Lasers dance across their skin.
First, Blackout. This is essential: they will have an ice luge. We need to go early before it gets gross.
Alcohol streams down a magnificent ice luge, into the mouths
We will play no more than two rounds of beer pong. Then we will head to...Kappa.
I/E. GREEN ROOM PARTY - NIGHT
Sean whispers the password to a Bouncer...
But we don't go in the front door. No. We go in the side door... Give
them the password, and go straight
upstairs to the Green Room.
Kunle and Sean roll into a psychedelic private party that is 100% green. Green lights, green walls, green everything.
You do not eat any of the baked goods, unless you want to be high out of your motherfucking mind.
Imaginary Kunle politely turns down a pot brownie from one of the partygoers. Sean takes one and nibbles on it...
Then we gotta get through stops three through five real quick. ZetaEta-Theta...
INT. ZETA-ETA-THETA PARTY - NIGHT
Sean and Kunle dance in a slightly too well lit room.
Lame but we gotta do it.
FOURTH STOP: OMICRON PHI KAPPA PARTY - NIGHT
Sean and Kunle dance. They're wearing nothing but trash bags for pants.
Omicron Phi Kappa. They're ABC-anything but clothes.
FIFTH STOP: PHI PHI PHI (TRI-PHI)
INT. TRI-PHI PARTY - NIGHT
Sean and Kunle pound energy drinks.
...Quick pit stop at Tri-Phi for energy drinks. Gotta make sure we're ready for...
INT. EQUINOX PARTY - NIGHT
The moment imaginary Sean and Kunle enter the new-age/earth mother themed party, flower garlands are put on their heads. SEAN (V.O.)
We see Dream Asa, looking like a badass flower goddess.
INT. BIO LAB - NIGHT
You guys are talking again? Yeah.
Like, just friends talking, or...?
We'll see.
INT. EQUINOX PARTY - NIGHT
Dream Asa walks up to Sean, and dances with him.
Here we dance.
Sean, Asa, and Kunle begin to dance with abandon, surrounded by friends. Drinks in hand. It's utter bliss.
And then finally... the best for last... Underground.
I/E. UNDERGROUND PARTY - NIGHT

Sean and Kunle step up to the party. A ray of light hits them, as if the heavens have opened up. Kunle sees someone inside, surrounded by a halo of light... Bianca. Beckoning them inside. The whole crew steps into the party, and disappears into the blinding heavenly light. BACK TO REALITY:
INT. BIO LAB - NIGHT
Sean puts down the yardstick, admiring his work. He turns back to the whiteboard.
You take Bianca home, I take some even hotter chick home, and that's our night. Any questions?
So, did you get the extra Underground pass? For Carlos?

Yo, it was hard enough to get two passes. I'm not wasting any favors on fucking Winnie the Pooh. What would it be like if he came along? Think about it: One, he's gonna insist on wearing that stupid fucking fanny pack. (MORE)

Two, he'll scare away any and all women within a hundred yard radius by offering them granola bars and talking about his SpaceX signing bonus. And three, he can't hold his liquor so you'll have to babysit him all night while he throws up, because I'm not doing it again. (re: Kunle's look) He's happy where he is. He started playing games after his last class yesterday, and hasn't left his room since. We probably won't see him for the rest of the week, he's so happy. We should remind him to like, eat and shower and stuff. He might actually die. ANYWAY. Any other questions?
Are we gonna die?
No. But you're gonna want to die a year from now, when you realize this will be the greatest accomplishment of our lives, and it's all downhill from here.
Kunle closes his special refrigerator. He takes out his key to lock it, but right before he puts it in-SEAN (CONT'D) SHIT! Startled, Kunle turns around.
It's already 7! We still need to get food before we pregame. As they leave, we hold on the refrigerator cabinet. It's
barely--just BARELY--cracked open.
EXT. MAIN STREET, COLLEGE TOWN - NIGHT

Music plays as Kunle and Sean make their way down main street, both eating pizza as they go. Sean is working his way through three slices stacked on top of each other. Drunk WHITE GIRLS eye Sean and Kunle, wary. Cross the street. As they get further from campus, things get more run-down. They walk past a vacant lot filled with overgrown weeds. Past old-ass houses, held together by sheer willpower.
EXT. CHEAP STREET - NIGHT
An EXHALE OF SMOKE. It's darker now. Sean vapes as he and Kunle continue down the cracked sidewalk. He offers the vape to Kunle, who declines.
You sure man?
I can't get high and drunk, I've gotta pick a lane. I told you I need to be in the lab super early-Kunle stops in his tracks.
Oh shit. Did I lock it? Did I lock it??
Sean has no idea what the fuck he's talking about.
My mold samples. I need to go back.
You serious? We've only got thirty minutes to pregame and get to Blackout. Just text our labmates, see if one of them can close it-KUNLE
I have to lock it closed with the key--it comes open!
Can't they just, like, jam a fork in it or something?
A fork? What??
...Just to keep it closed til tomorrow.
It's my thesis! My fungi need to be at the right temperature and humidity, or they'll die. Can't we just... skip the pregame?
NEVER skip the pregame. Man, if we're late to the first party, the whole schedule will be off...
Just go ahead without me. I'll meet up with you there.
No. I'll drive you back to campus. But you better be fucking quick... We got like 5 minutes to pre-game and change when we get back. Have anything?
I think I have some gin.
Fuck gin. That shit tastes like Christmas Tree.
I'll make you a Ginnamon Toast Crunch.
They approach a beat up old MINIVAN parked on the curb. It's Sean's. He goes to the driver's side, unlocks the doors.
The fuck is that?
Exactly what you think it is.

Carlos invented it. Sounds weird but it's actually delicious-But then, Sean is looking past Kunle, frowning at something. Kunle turns to look toward... Their SHITTY DUPLEX APARTMENT BUILDING. The door is ajar.
Hell no, he did not leave the door unlocked again.
Sean charges past Kunle, up the stoop and through the open door. Kunle follows close behind, as-22
INT. THE APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS
It's completely dark inside. Sean beelines for his bedroom.
CARLOS! Motherfucker, my PS4 better still be here.

Kunle stops on the threshold, notices a PINK CAKE BOX, addressed to him. He picks it up. He steps inside, flicks the lights on... crosses into the kitchen. He quietly sets the box on the counter, opens it. Inside, a cake in Princeton colors, orange and black. It says PRINCETON on it. The inside of the box lid says "Congratulations Kunle! We are so proud of you!" He closes it. He looks for somewhere to hide the cake box, out of sight. As he hides the cake, we pull back to see, in the foreground... A pair of WOMAN'S LEGS, with bloody knees, sticking out from behind the sofa in the living room. A lamp and some books have been knocked down onto the floor.
Is anything missing in there?
I don't think so.
INT. THE APARTMENT - LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

Kunle steps into the living room. And then he sees her. WTF? Beat. Cautious, Kunle inches forward. Looking down at... An UNCONSCIOUS YOUNG WOMAN, laying face-down on the floor. She's young, maybe 18, and WHITE. She wears a short dress made of PINK DUCT TAPE, and lays there barefoot. Sean comes back down the hallway, oblivious.
Everything seems like it's still here. But... fucking Winnie the
Pooh. Ima hide his weed until he learns how to lock the door behind
Sean.
Kunle points at the young woman. They exchange glances... Who
They move to the side of her, to see her face. But it's half hidden by her hair.
Hello?
Sean gets real close to the girl. He CLAPS in her face. She doesn't stir.
Wake up! Wake up!
Kunle kneels down beside her. Sean watches anxiously.
You know her?
Kunle doesn't. He reaches out toward her-SEAN (CONT'D) What you doing? Don't touch her-this is like a crime scene! Kunle takes her pulse.
She's alive. She's... breathing.
Pulse is fast, breathing's slow...
(relief) Fuck.

Kunle rolls the girl onto her back. He takes her by the shoulders, SHAKES her gently. Her eyes flutter open for a moment, and then close again. She GROANS, rolls back onto her side. She's clearly out of it.
What's wrong with her?
Kunle notices her scraped up knees. Her skirt is pushed up a little too much for comfort... He takes a blanket off the couch, drapes it over her lower half. That's better. But still not good.
Should we like...call 911?
He looks up at Sean, but Sean's eyes are looking down the hallway. He's freaking out.
Carlos.
Sean points to the door at the end of the hall. LIGHT comes out from the crack under one door.
What if he's dead? Fuck. I'm too fucking high for this shit right now. Go check. GO!
Sean pushes a reluctant Kunle down the hallway. Kunle proceeds slowly down... Leaving Sean alone. Sean can barely look down at the girl. He clearly wants to be anywhere but here.
INT. THE APARTMENT - HALLWAY/CARLOS' ROOM - CONTINUOUS

Kunle pauses outside the door. He listens, but hears nothing. He cracks the door open, peeking inside. The room is filled with a smoky haze. The walls are filled with posters of anime and SpaceX rockets. CARLOS (20, Chicano) is sitting on a yoga ball in front of his gaming computer, earbuds in, extremely focused on his game of Civilization. He takes a hit from his bong.
Carlos. There's this girl on the-Carlos takes out one of his earbuds.
Wait. I am presently at war with Russia and the Aztec Empire. Shit is getting real.
Do you know the girl out there?
Wait a second-Kunle snatches the mouse from Carlos' hand.
Hey!
This is a turn-based game! There is no urgency! There's this girl--
(suddenly intrigued) Ahhh, girl problems?
There is an unconscious white girl in our living room.
Carlos looks at him like, What? Suddenly, they hear Sean YELLING downstairs-25
INT. THE APARTMENT - LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

Kunle rushes in, Carlos trailing close behind. The girl has VOMITED all over the floor. She's coughing. Sean watching her in horror-Carlos immediately retches at the sight of the vomit. He shields his eyes.
Who is she?
We don't know.
Kunle rushes to her, putting her on her side in recovery position, as she continues to COUGH. The coughing subsides. Silence.
Is she... dead?
Kunle pokes her on the arm. No response. Then... She rolls onto her back. Looks at him, glassy-eyed.
Mmhnghh... WheresMaddy...?
Hey, what'd you say?
Canyoutellherim...? Ifeelweird.
Kunle kneels down, rolls her onto her side again.
Stop touching her!
We have to keep her on her side, or she could inhale vomit and die... I'm First Aid Certified.
Sean rolls his eyes. Of course he is.
Hey, what's your name? Nothing.
We should call 911, right?
Yes?
Kunle takes out his cell. Dials 9...1...
Nigga, are you crazy? Stop. STOP.
Kunle stops.
You know what the cops are gonna think? They're gonna come in here, shoot us and arrest us for killing this white bitch.
Shoot us and arrest us? We didn't
do anything wrong-The second Kunle looks back down at the phone to dial, Sean SLAPS it out of his hand! It lands in the puddle of VOMIT.
What the fuck?!
Ughh.

We don't have to do nothing wrong. Just gotta be in the wrong place at the wrong time. White girl down, in a house that reeks like motherfucking weed? Your fingerprints and DNA are all over her! Carlos, you were here the whole fucking time! What's your alibi? Carlos doesn't have a good answer.

We can just tell them-SEAN They ain't gonna listen. The cops don't know you're basically white inside. They gonna walk up in here, see three scary brown guys standing over this tiny little white girl. Y'all don't see how fucked this looks? We can't call 911.
Kunle's about to argue, but hesitates... He exchanges glances with Carlos. Maybe Sean's right. They look down at the girl at their feet. She breathes slow.
INT. THE APARTMENT - LIVING ROOM - NIGHT
Kunle, Sean, and Carlos all sit on the couch, thinking: what the fuck are they gonna do?
Perhaps we could persuade a friend to come here and call 911 for us. Someone less...
Brown? So, a white person.
A female would be preferable.
We could call Bianca.
I don't know... Like, she's nice but she don't know us that well.
Asa?
I'd rather not put my life in the hands of my ex-girlfriend. Plus, she's black. We need a white girl.
Wow... I don't really know many of my white female peers. Troubling.
They sit in silence.
You could call White Sean. A football player never gets in trouble. Kunle sighs, nods. It's the best they've got so far.
Sean dials, calls. It rings. We hear the voice of WHITE SEAN, 21, who is somewhere loud.
Sup Sean?
White Sean! You on campus?
Sorry man, I'm kinda-
Where are you?
Oh, uh, I'm actually on a microbrewery tour with my momSEAN So you're not at school?
Nope. Hey, I didn't think I'd like fuckin' hipster beer, butSEAN Ok that's great man, gotta go.
Sean hangs up.
Who else can we call?
Brian Phan?
Yeah, Asian is neutral to cops.
Brian's in Cabo for break.
Come on, y'all, think of white people. (beat) We're like 1% of the school! How do we not know any white people?

Sean, Kunle, and Carlos are gathered together on the couch, playing a particularly intense game of JENGA. Kunle's PRINCETON CAKE lays out. Kunle cuts it, distributes pieces to some guests: Rafael is here, as are Bianca and a few others. Sean clocks Bianca flirting with Kunle. Gives him a look across the table. Someone knocks at the door. Kunle jumps up to get it...
INT. THE APARTMENT - ENTRYWAY - DAY
The door swings open. To Kunle's surprise, it's Maddy and Emma. Awake, alert, and put together. Emma holds a large GIFT BASKET.
Hey. Is Carlos here?
WHO IS IT? IS IT PIZZA?
DO I HAVE TO?
YES.

We don't want to intrude. We just had something to say...
Thank you so much for everything, for getting me to the hospital. And sorry for apparently breaking into your house and throwing up everywhere. So embarrassing.
I live literally two houses down from you guys, so she must have thought this was my place.
That's what we think I thought, because honestly I don't remember anything.
Emma laughs. Kunle and Carlos laugh along with her, a tinge of anger simmering under the surface of their smiles.
We can pay for any rugs that need to be cleaned-KUNLE It's cool. Hardwood floors.

Thanks so much again.
Emma hands Carlos the gift basket, and leaves the three of them alone.
She awkwardly takes out a prepared statement.

I'm sorry you ended up bearing the burden of my responsibility to look after Emma. I'm sorry I yelled at you when you were trying to help. I'm sorry I tried to pepper spray you... Alright, this is weird.
Maddy puts the letter away. She struggles to find the words.
I know this isn't enough. I'm just... I really am sorry. (long beat) I never got a chance to thank you for saving Emma's life that night.

Reveal Sean's been watching from the doorway.

THE APARTMENT - THE LIVING ROOM - DAY
Where everyone else is happily gathered around the Jenga tower, laughing, drinking. At ease. Kunle settles onto the couch between Sean and Carlos.

He leans forward, reaches for his Jenga piece... The tower is tall and full of holes. It's already wobbling... When he touches his block, a siren sounds outside, somewhere in the distance. Kunle's smile falters at the sound. He can't relax, as the siren grows louder. A beat. Kunle reaches out, rests his block at the very top of the tower. He looks into camera, as the tower teeters dangerously.
INT. BLACK STUDENT UNION - HALL OF FIRSTS - DAY

We see Kunle and Sean sneak into the Hall of Firsts at night with a step ladder. They hang a plaque high, high up on the wall, where nobody will notice.... They leave, quick as they came. A slow zoom in on the counterfeit plaque: a cute photo of Kunle and Sean (with Carlos photobomb) that says FIRST MEN TO SNEAK THEMSELVES INTO THE HALL OF FIRSTS.
